title: Public reproducibility package for doctoral manuscripts on electricity price forecasting, load forecasting, and virtual power plant decision learning
description: Public-data-only reproducibility package for a three-manuscript research program on electricity price forecasting, transferable load forecasting, and decision-focused virtual power plant operation. The archive contains source code, manifests, documentation, reproducibility scripts, and synthetic or public-data-derived examples. Private local operational records, customer identifiers, contract terms, account numbers, settlement sheets, and non-public bidding details are excluded. Upstream public datasets retain their original licenses and attribution requirements.

creators.name: Ren, Zhijie
creators.affiliation: College of Computer Science, Hunan University

notes: MIT applies to repository coordination code, scripts, and metadata created for this release. Public-source data files remain governed by their upstream licenses and redistribution notes.
